title: wWaypoints
body:
# 0.6.0 Drops June 21, Available today on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/cw/wSmoothie)
**Officially Allowed on Hoplite**
![0.6.0 Update June 21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbd132a4b46455fd825fb41001673322787f8b0f_0.webp)
wWaypoints is the new best waypoint mod. It has unique features including, multi-block waypoints, block and item icon's, clean folders, tons of customization and much more.

The mod has additional features such as toggle sneak improvement and a toggleable sign GUI popup designed to make trapping much better.

# Watch Sheet's Showcase (0.6.0):
